meta.title: Marine Corps Boot Camp Gas Chamber
meta.description:
Recruits going through Marine Corps boot camp will go through the Gas Chamber during week three of training. Training for CBRN defense is an event in which recruits experience the exposure of gasses and learn how to properly use a gas mask. 

(U.S. Marine Corps video by Lance Cpl. Godfrey Ampong)
